ddls:
CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the URL associated with the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the interaction was made */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., tweet, retweet, mention) */,
  "is_mention" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is a mention */,
  "is_reply" INTEGER /* Indicates if the interaction is a reply */,
  "parent_interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent interaction (if it's a reply) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the interaction */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the interaction */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the interaction (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform where the user is registered */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the user */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of accounts the user is following */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data collection */,
  "api_version" TEXT /* API version */,
  "auth_endpoint" TEXT /* Authentication endpoint */,
  "oauth_token_endpoint" TEXT /* OAuth token endpoint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction where the mention was made */,
  "mentioned_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_mentioned_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("mentioned_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* The URL itself */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction where the URL was posted */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., image, video, link) */,
  "url_title" TEXT /* Title of the URL */,
  "url_description" TEXT /* Description of the URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urls_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag" TEXT /* The hashtag itself */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction where the hashtag was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hashtags_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "user_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, comment, share) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_versions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., likes, comments, shares) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_metrics_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., person, place, organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_entities_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "following_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("following_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_blockers" (
  "blocker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blocker */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being blocked */,
  "blocker_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blocker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blocker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blockers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_blockers_blocker_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("blocker_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
